# Per-dataset LRI heatmaps

```{r genes-lri-plots}
library(umap)
plot_lri_heatmap_umap(Kurten_HNSC.malignant, "Kurten_HNSC")
plot_lri_heatmap_umap(Puram_HNSC.malignant,  "Puram_HNSC")
plot_lri_heatmap_umap(Choi_HNSC.malignant,   "Choi_HNSC")
plot_lri_heatmap_umap(Bill_HNSC.malignant,   "Bill_HNSC")
```
